selection_policy.global_hyperparameters: fixed_before_holdout_scoring; no model family uses test labels for tuning
selection_policy.primary_cartoboost_row: single configured cartoboost run; no internal candidate is selected on test metrics
selection_policy.zone_target_encoding: fit on training rows for each outer split before transforming holdout rows
selection_policy.graph_feature_gate: uses deterministic inner train/validation rows inside the training split only
selection_policy.neural_feature_gate: uses deterministic inner train/validation rows inside the training split only
selection_policy.segment_diagnostics: computed after prediction and excluded from fitting, tuning, and model selection

random.purpose: interpolation across rows drawn from the same task distribution

spatial_holdout.purpose: generalization to held-out pickup zones where eligible

duration.description: Predict log trip duration from zone, trip, passenger, and time features.

fare.description: Predict log total amount from zone, trip, passenger, and time features.

pickup_demand.description: Predict log pickup trip count for a pickup zone, hour, and weekday bucket.

cartoboost.reason: learned models are skipped for pickup_demand cold-zone spatial holdout; the split removes all zone demand history, so predictions collapse to priors

lightgbm.reason: learned models are skipped for pickup_demand cold-zone spatial holdout; the split removes all zone demand history, so predictions collapse to priors
